Description: Attacker attempts repeated login attempts to compromise user accounts
Current_Controls: brute_detector.py - automated detection; GPO account lockout policy
Treatment: Mitigate - lockout policy already implemented; enhance with MFA

Description: Attacker exploits unsanitized input fields to extract or modify database data
Vulnerability: Lack of input validation in web applications
Current_Controls: sqli_report.txt - documented findings; OmniPortal_Assessment.md - remediation steps
Treatment: Mitigate - implement parameterized queries; conduct code review

Description: Attacker moves laterally through network after initial compromise
Current_Controls: docker-compose.yml - network segmentation; firewall_config.sh - UFW rules
Treatment: Mitigate - maintain and expand network segmentation

Description: Attacker injects malicious scripts into web pages viewed by users
Treatment: Mitigate - implement Content Security Policy; encode all output

Current_Controls: harden.sh - permission hardening; gpo_audit.txt - GPO enforcement
Treatment: Mitigate - regular GPO audits; patch management program

Description: Malicious code exfiltrates sensitive data to external attacker
Vulnerability: Lack of endpoint protection; insufficient monitoring
Current_Controls: custom_ids.rules - Suricata detection; edr_policy.xml - EDR policy
Treatment: Mitigate - IDS signatures + EDR already deployed; expand coverage

Description: Known CVE exploited before patch applied
Current_Controls: remediation_plan.md - CVE tracking; nmap_scan_results.txt - vulnerability discovery
Treatment: Mitigate - establish formal patch SLAs (critical: 72h; high: 7d)

Description: Authorized user intentionally exfiltrates sensitive information
Vulnerability: Insufficient data access controls; no DLP
Current_Controls: gpo_audit.txt - access controls; collection_log.txt - data handling procedures
Treatment: Mitigate - implement DLP controls; enhance audit logging

Description: Attacker escapes Docker container to host system
Treatment: Mitigate - maintain non-privileged container configs; regular image updates

Description: Employee clicks malicious link or attachment leading to compromise
Vulnerability: Lack of security awareness; no email filtering
Treatment: Mitigate - implement email filtering; security awareness training

Description: Attacker floods system with traffic rendering it unavailable
Vulnerability: No DDoS protection; insufficient capacity planning
Treatment: Accept - lab environment; monitor and escalate if production

Description: Log files or forensic evidence modified to conceal attacker activity
Treatment: Mitigate - implement remote syslog; cryptographic log signing

Description: Vulnerabilities introduced via third-party software or services
Treatment: Mitigate - establish vendor risk assessment program

Description: System cannot be recovered in acceptable timeframe after failure
Vulnerability: No formal backup policy or tested recovery procedures
Treatment: Mitigate - define RTO/RPO; implement and test backup procedures

Description: Attacker maps network topology before launching attack
Treatment: Mitigate - IDS rules already detect recon patterns
